mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adaptive_session_feedback ( adaptive_session_id, music_fit, focus_relax_help, transition_natural, memo, skipped, created_at ) VALUES ( #{adaptiveSessionId}, #{musicFit}, #{focusRelaxHelp}, #{transitionNatural}, #{memo}, #{skipped}, #{createdAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE music_fit = VALUES(music_fit), focus_relax_help = VALUES(focus_relax_help), transition_natural = VALUES(transition_natural), memo = VALUES(memo), skipped = VALUES(skipped), created_at = VALUES(created_at)
mapper.select: SELECT adaptive_session_id, music_fit, focus_relax_help, transition_natural, memo, skipped, created_at FROM adaptive_session_feedback WHERE adaptive_session_id = #{adaptiveSessionId}
